resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Credit rollover or expire (use or lose)', but the evidence does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case states that credits expire at the end of the month with no rollover, yet there is no concrete API read or persisted state check provided to substantiate this claim. The absence of direct evidence regarding the credit expiration policy leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in satisfying the requirement.
evidencePointers: The Membership with Included Services use case mentions credits expire month-end (no rollover).
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of credit expiration or rollover policy.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
